relevant_configuration.denied_tools: bash, webfetch, websearch, task, agent_manager, skill, lsp, external_directory, todowrite, todoread
relevant_configuration.remote_modes: not used; attach, serve, web, remote, daemon, and cloud-fork modes are not used
relevant_configuration.task_delivery: task copied into supplied worktree at .kilo/axiom-task.md; prompt instructs Kilo to read that file
